title: Rainbow Smoke Veggie Delight
description: A salty and tender vegan-friendly Greek dish featuring rainbow trout cooked in one-pot with a savory smoke flavor.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Rinse and pat dry the rainbow trout fillets.
Season both sides of the trout with paprika. Heat olive oil in a large non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add onions, garlic, bell peppers, and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Gently place the trout fillets on top of the vegetables. Drizzle with red wine vinegar to prevent sticking. Cover with foil and bake for 20-25 minutes or until fish flakes easily with a fork.
Stir in Greek yogurt just before serving, garnish with chopped cilantro. Serve hot as a meal.
Optional: For an enhanced flavor, use smoke packets during cooking for added depth.
